race.comment: CRESSBROOK (1) has been very good in two runs this prep, the latest offering an eye-catching second over 1200m at Eagle Farm in a BM65. Cherry ripe now and will find this far easier. The 63kgs is the only niggle. MOET AT MIDNIGHT (8) comfortably scored when fresh from a spell two back at Beaudesert then struggled in a better race at the Gold Coast more recently. Beautifully drawn and coming back to this level he poses a serious threat. GAMING (6) was five weeks between runs last start so can improve on that ninth at the Gold Coast. Just missed in a Class 3 at Coffs Harbour the run prior which is solid form for a race of this quality. SOL FILIA (9) led from barrier rise and demolished a maiden field over 1400m at this track last start. Unclear how much the heavy track contributed to that margin. Each-way claims. OURLEGSELEVEN (13) disappointed at Grafton seven days ago. Prefers the sting out of the ground but worth throwing in wider exotics.
